commit.message:
docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix post creation to use JSON request body instead of query params

Add @RequestBody to FeedController, send content as JSON body in load
test client, and configure Redis ObjectMapper with JavaTimeModule for
proper date serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which
fails on the :ro mounted init-graph.cypher. The file is already
mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement news feed system with fanout architecture

Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 app with Nginx load balancer, Post Service
(PostgreSQL + Redis cache), Fanout Service (RabbitMQ → workers → News Feed
Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial release: Storyboard plugin for Wan2GP (v0.2.0)

Multi-shot storyboard sequencer with batch queue injection for video
generation. Compose shots, queue them all via add_video_task(), then
let Wan2GP's process_tasks pipeline handle generation.

Features:
- Shot list with add/duplicate/remove/reorder
- Per-shot settings (prompt, seed, resolution, frames, CFG, etc.)
- Batch queue injection into Wan2GP's generation queue
- 3-second auto-poll for generation progress via gen["file_list"]
- ffmpeg assembly (stream copy or re-encode)
- Save/load storyboard as JSON
- Metadata hook tags clips with storyboard context

commit.message:
Add Tier 1-2 SVG features: mask, pattern, tspan, filter primitives, gradient improvements

Color:
- Add CurrentColor case (CSS currentColor inheritance)

Style:
- Add Visibility (Visible/Hidden/Collapse) and Display (Inline/DisplayNone) DUs
- Add StrokeMiterLimit, Mask, Visibility, Display fields with with* helpers

Text:
- Add TextBaseline, FontVariant, LengthAdjust DUs
- Add TSpan type with position, offset, font properties, dominant-baseline
- Add TSpan module with create/with* functions
- Add Baseline, AlignmentBaseline, FontVariant, WordSpacing, TextLength, LengthAdjust, Spans
  fields to Text with corresponding with*/addSpan helpers

Gradient:
- Add SpreadMethod DU (Pad/Reflect/Repeat)
- Add SpreadMethod, GradientTransform, Href fields to LinearGradient and RadialGradient

FilterEffect:
- Add TurbulenceType, MorphologyOperator, ChannelSelector, TransferFuncType, LightSource DUs
- Add ComponentTransfer, ConvolveMatrix, DisplacementMap, Merge, Morphology,
  SpecularLighting, Turbulence filter primitive cases with factory functions

Mask: new file — mask element with id, units, location, size, body
Pattern: new file — pattern paint server with id, position, size, units, transform, viewBox, body

SvgDefinitions:
- Add MaskDef, PatternDef cases with addMask/addPattern helpers

commit.message:
Add horizon off state: double-click toggle, -1.0 sentinel, shader guards

Horizon control supports off mode (horizonY = -1.0) via double-click toggle.
Shaders guard all horizon effects behind horizon_y >= 0.0 check — scatter
falls back to simple vertical blend, density/forms skip horizon proximity.
H key cycles center → off → center. Canvas guide suppressed when off.

commit.message:
Fix iOS crash on stop recording: proper audio teardown and worker guards

- Await audioContext.close() instead of fire-and-forget (iOS WebKit race)
- Fix teardown order: stop worklet -> close context -> stop media tracks
- Add stop signal to AudioWorklet so process() returns false cleanly
- Guard all worker result handlers with isRecording check
- Invalidate in-flight inference on stop via requestId increment
- Remove post-teardown requestAnalysis() that triggered dead pipelines
- Clear audio sample buffers on stop to release memory
- Add ONNX session release support to inference worker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(sim): use VPython native camera API for chase camera

Replace scene.camera.pos/axis (which VPython overrides each frame)
with scene.center/forward/range. VPython automatically positions the
camera at center - forward * range, so setting forward to the yaw
direction places the camera behind the drone looking ahead.

This should fix the camera not following yaw rotation at all.

commit.message:
feat: add structured logging across full LLM pipeline

Adds [LLM], [narrative], and [task] prefixed log messages so the
complete request lifecycle is visible in worker logs:

- [task] orchestrator start/end with timing
- [task] narrative generation start/end with system list and timing
- [task] backend + model used per narrative
- [narrative] per-system LLM request sent / response received
- [LLM] model attempted, fallback transitions, response timing + token counts

Fix PSPLA matching for generic trading names using CO registered name

  to find a licensed match, retry with the exact CO registered name

  as exact whole words in PSPLA name (catches coast vs coastal mismatches)

  returned, even for full-name matches

commit.message:
Implement 1-4 Pachner move

Replace one tetrahedron [a,b,c,d] with four by introducing a new
vertex v, each new tet substituting one original vertex with v.
Internal and external gluings are handled automatically via shared
vertex labels. Also adds a removeTetrahedron helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ha: stable IPv6 router identity and per-RG RA isolation (#192)

Add a deterministic stable link-local address (fe80::bf:72:CC:RR) shared
across cluster nodes for each RETH interface. Managed like a VIP: only
present on the MASTER node. RA sender binds to this address so hosts see
the same IPv6 router identity regardless of which node is primary.

On failover, an NA burst updates host neighbor caches for the stable
link-local, achieving IPv6 parity with IPv4 GARP-based failover.

Fix snapshotRethMasterState() using AllVRRPMaster() which returns false
in noRethVRRP/private-election mode (no VRRP instances exist). This
caused clearRethServicesForRG() to withdraw ALL RA senders when any
single RG failed over, killing IPv6 routing for unrelated RGs. Fixed
by using IsActive() which correctly reflects clusterPri || allMaster.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: split monolith into 5 modules + add colored subtitles and perf optimizations

Split mcp_speech.py (2996 lines) into modular architecture:
- state.py: shared mutable state, constants, config, cached timestamps
- audio.py: audio I/O, device detection, chimes, ANSI colors, VAD, pre-warming
- stt.py: STT backends (streaming WS, VAD+REST, Whisper, fixed)
- speech_tts.py: TTS, multi_speak, talk full-duplex
- mcp_speech.py: MCP protocol layer, tool schemas, stdio transport

New features:
- Colored subtitles: light_green for user speech, amber for TTS, per-voice overrides
- subtitle_color param on speak/talk/multi_speak tools
- subtitle_color_user/subtitle_color_tts in configure
- Full-duplex chime when TTS finishes (signals "your turn")

Performance:
- Cached ISO timestamps (avoids 1000+ strftime calls per recording)
- Debounced connection pre-warming (_schedule_warmup)
- Config value caching in hot loops
- Progress notification dedup (last_msg tracking)

Bumps version to 4.1.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
